rows.label: tev032401_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev032401_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Jajanni about Ma-non technology.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032401_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev032401_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Jajanni about recent developments.

rows.label: tev032401_SEL0031
rows.name:
Ask Jajanni about the
device Lin is building.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032401_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Jajanni about recent developments.

rows.label: tev032401_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Jajanni about Doll flight modules.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032401_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Jajanni about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032401_MSG0001
rows.name:
The Ma-non aren't exactly fans of creating
things that hurt people, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032401_MSG0002
rows.name:
So when discussions arose to work
with you to create weaponry...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032401_MSG0003
rows.name:
Well, I suppose you'd say that not
everyone was on board? We actually
argued about it for some time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032401_MSG0004
rows.name:
But in the end, we agreed that it would be
unfair to kick back and do do nothing while
you put your lives in danger, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032401_MSG0005
rows.name:
So we agreed to start Candid
& Credible as a means of
providing you weapons, you see?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032401_MSG0006
rows.name:
Things that go boom may not be our specialty, but
Ma-non technology is the finest in the cosmos, right?
So please use our products to to save this city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032401_MSG0011
rows.name:
Did you know that one of our finest
technicians has moved down to to the
hangar under the administrative district?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032401_MSG0012
rows.name:
I think he decided to
open a repair shop?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032401_MSG0013
rows.name:
You should be careful if you go
speak to the old guy, however.
He can be kind of...touchy?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032401_MSG0014
rows.name:
Frankly, I'm not even sure you and he will
be able to get along? But I hope you do,
because he could be a huge help to you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032401_MSG0020
rows.name:
Lin asked us a whole barrage of
questions about how our ship's
flight systems work, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032401_MSG0021
rows.name:
And now I finally know the reason, don't I?
She was working on a spectacular modification
that grants your Dolls flight capabilities![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032401_MSG0022
rows.name:
I respect Lin's ingenuity, even if
she has a host of technical problems
she must still overcome...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032401_MSG0023
rows.name:
I hope her big dream becomes
a big reality, don't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032401_MSG0028
rows.name:
The other day I decided to do a little research into
what the other arms manufacturers are making, right?
So I went out and bought a Sakuraba weapon...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032401_MSG0029
rows.name:
It's actually quite impressive.
You can tell they take pride in
their quality, can't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032401_MSG0030
rows.name:
I did a little poking around to find out who
their lead engineer is, you know? Turns out
it's an older fellow by by the name of Isobe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032401_MSG0031
rows.name:
I observed him from a distance, and all he did
was yell at his workers. So I didn't dare approach
him to ask more specific questions, you see?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032401_MSG0032
rows.name:
Still, I hope that one
day we can talk shop?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032401_MSG1001
rows.name:
The Doll flight modules should allow you
to reach previously inaccessible areas
and further your research, correct?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032401_MSG1002
rows.name:
They also let you attack enemies on
the ground with impunity, right? I
imagine that must be be fun...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032401_MSG1003
rows.name:
But all that flying around expends a great
deal of fuel, doesn't it? It's probably
something you want to keep in mind at all times.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032401_MSG1004
rows.name:
You don't want to be a mile off
the ground when you run out of
fuel, no? That would be so so bad.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032401_MSG1005
rows.name:
So enjoy flying Mira's skies, but
don't forget to keep one eye on
your fuel at all times, okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032401_MSG1010
rows.name:
After burning the midnight oil with
Isobe to get the project done, he
actually opened up a little...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032401_MSG1011
rows.name:
Now C&C and Sakuraba are periodically
sharing tech and improving our
services. Which is great, yes?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032401_MSG1012
rows.name:
The thing is, Isobe let me have an
up-close-and- personal look at your
Doll tech, and I have to say...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032401_MSG1013
rows.name:
Well, honestly, it's way beyond anything else you
you humans have cooked up. Huge parts of it are just
completely out of your league. Er, no offense?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032401_MSG1014
rows.name:
I wonder who the original architect
was? Isobe didn't know, which
just adds to to the mystery.[ST:wait ]
